query:
SELECT d.id, c.telegramId, COUNT(m.id) as msgCount 
FROM dialogs d 
JOIN contacts c ON d.contactId = c.id 
LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.dialogId = d.id
WHERE c.telegramId LIKE 'channel_%' OR c.telegramId LIKE 'group_%'
GROUP BY d.id, c.telegramId
HAVING msgCount > 0;
